race.description: Scavenger Safety Pinjarra Cup Mobile Pace (G3)
race.comment: Topliner MINSTREL NZ (9) makes his first appearance since ending last campaign by winning four of his last five starts, last seen in landing December's G1 WA Pacing Cup. Five-time fresh winner and has claimed this race for the last two years. Good enough to overcome a back row draw for the hat trick. MAGNIFICENT STORM NZ (11) took advantage of a good draw to lead for a resuming win at Gloucester Park. Much tougher barrier but he owns a good record here and flies second-up, winning seven of nine attempts. BETTER ECLIPSE (8) has been very consistent of late and added to a series of top-four finishes when runner-up at G3 level last start. Draws for a trail and can be competitive again along with SORRIDERE (2) who is aided by a low draw and has a great record here, winning five of seven attempts.
